violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Refrigerator on back wall had temperature of 59 F.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Observed meat in a pan with back door open to thaw.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Observed meat in refrigerators, freezers not labeled or date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed grease and debris build up around cooking equipment.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Observed build up of grease on filters.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. observed paper bags, to go lids stored on the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed debris buildup on floors and walls.

General premises. — --Window/door used for ventilation purposes was not properly protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Back door open with no protection against entry of insects or rodents.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
